hypothesis: Integrating a layout-aware vision module for chemical-figure detection and table parsing, an OCSR engine for structure images, and a schema-constrained verifier into a modality-routed multi-agent pipeline will raise SMILES extraction recall to ≥0.60 and increase overall F1 by ≥0.15 absolute on ChemX small-molecule datasets relative to the best single-agent baseline, without reducing precision by more than 0.05.
